common.name: Name
menu.open.no-gear: You do not have the bomber gear.
menu.socket.title: Bomber Gear Socket
menu.socket.subtitle: View current gear state and remove sockets
menu.socket.gear-status.title: Current gear status
menu.socket.footer: To equip a socket, hold the socket item and right-click.
menu.socket.hover.remove: Remove the socket from this slot.
menu.socket.error.equip-failed: Failed to equip. Check your inventory space.
menu.socket.error.no-equipped-socket: There is no socket to remove from this slot.
menu.socket.error.power-cap-reached: Power can no longer be increased.
menu.socket.error.bomb-count-cap-reached: Bomb count can no longer be increased.
menu.socket.status.title: Current active effects
menu.socket.tool-status.title: Tool levels used for breaking
gmcm.open-socket-menu-key.name: Open socket menu key
gmcm.open-socket-menu-key.tooltip: Key used to open the bomber gear socket menu.
gmcm.fuse-seconds.name: Fuse time
gmcm.fuse-seconds.tooltip: Seconds from placing a bomb until it explodes.
gmcm.base-power.name: Base power
gmcm.base-power.tooltip: Initial blast power before socket bonuses.
gmcm.max-power.name: Power cap
gmcm.max-power.tooltip: The final maximum power the Bomber Gear can reach.
gmcm.base-max-bombs.name: Base max bombs
gmcm.base-max-bombs.tooltip: Initial maximum number of bombs that can be placed at once.
gmcm.max-bombs.name: Bomb count cap
gmcm.max-bombs.tooltip: The final maximum simultaneous bomb count the Bomber Gear can reach.
gmcm.player-damage.name: Player damage
gmcm.player-damage.tooltip: Fixed damage dealt to players by bomb explosions. Set to 0 to disable.
gmcm.monster-damage.name: Monster damage
gmcm.monster-damage.tooltip: Fixed damage dealt to monsters by bomb explosions. Set to 0 to disable.
gmcm.explosion-damage-duration.name: Explosion damage duration
gmcm.explosion-damage-duration.tooltip: How long the explosion hitbox remains active after detonation.
gmcm.bomb-damage-invincibility.name: Bomb damage invincibility
gmcm.bomb-damage-invincibility.tooltip: How long targets stay immune to bomb damage after being hit.
gmcm.kick-slide-step-ticks.name: Kick slide speed
gmcm.kick-slide-step-ticks.tooltip: Ticks between each tile movement while a kicked bomb is sliding. Larger values are slower.
gmcm.socket-drops.enabled.name: Enable socket drops
gmcm.socket-drops.enabled.tooltip: Enable socket item drops when stones or ore blocks are destroyed.
gmcm.socket-drops.only-mine-locations.to: Only allow socket drops in mine-like locations.
gmcm.socket-drops.power-bomb-per-floor.t: Expected total Power Core and Bomb Bag drops per mine floor.
Expected total Remote, Pierce, Kick, and Power Glove chip drops per mine floor.
Expected number of normal stone blocks destroyed per mine floor.
gmcm.socket-drops.expected-ore-breaks.to: Expected number of ore blocks destroyed per mine floor.
gmcm.socket-drops.stone-chance-multiplie: Multiplier for how easily socket items appear from normal stones.
Multiplier for how easily socket items appear from ore blocks.
gmcm.socket-drops.apply-drop-cap.name: Apply drop caps
gmcm.socket-drops.apply-drop-cap.tooltip: If enabled, socket items stop dropping once the world already has enough to match the Bomber Gear limits.
gmcm.reset-sockets-on-death.name: Reset sockets on death
gmcm.reset-sockets-on-death.tooltip: If enabled, the bomber gear's equipped sockets are cleared when the player is knocked out in combat.
mail.bomber_gear.title: Bomber Gear Delivery
mail.bomber_gear.body: A prototype Bomber Gear has been delivered to you. Keep it close, and use it carefully. If your Bomber Gear no longer exists anywhere, another one will be sent to your mailbox.
